_legend: all dummy — fabricated, plausible. Replace with official wording before real use.
vision: To make student life at IIT Patna supportive, inclusive, and easy to navigate — so every student can thrive academically, personally, and socially.
mission: Provide a single, clear front door to every student support service on campus.
Ensure safe, comfortable and well-run residential life.
Champion student wellness — physical, mental, and emotional.
Enable a vibrant culture of clubs, festivals, sports, and leadership.
Uphold fairness through transparent grievance redressal and a zero-tolerance stance on ragging and harassment.

values.title: Accessibility
values.body: Information and help are never more than a couple of clicks — or a short walk — away.

values.title: Inclusion
values.body: Every student belongs, supported regardless of background.

values.title: Wellbeing
values.body: We put student health and safety first, always.

values.title: Integrity
values.body: We act transparently and treat every student fairly.
